message:
Clean up repo: Remove binaries and archive old docs

Removed unwanted binaries (7.3MB):
- bench_go (2.7MB)
- benchmarks/fibonacci_go (2.3MB)
- benchmarks/hello_go (2.3MB)

Archived packages/tokenizer/ documentation (24 files):
- Moved old benchmark results to docs/archive/
- Moved strategy docs to docs/archive/
- Moved temp analysis files to docs/archive/

Kept at tokenizer root:
- bench_web_results.md (latest web benchmark)
- bench_training_results.md (latest training)
- BENCHMARKS.md (main documentation)

Repo is now clean - binaries rebuild to .build/ directory.
